description_long: This is a large, multi-story residential house with a stately and symmetrical facade, featuring a prominent arched window above the main entrance. The exterior is clad in light-colored brickwork with contrasting dark roofing and window frames, giving it a refined and elegant appearance. The roof is complex, with multiple gables and dormers, and is bordered by decorative railings and several chimneys. The front entryway is accentuated by a covered porch with steps leading up, supported by columns and topped with a curved overhang. Windows are generously sized and symmetrically arranged, with some featuring decorative lintels and sills. The house sits on a stone foundation and includes a wraparound porch on the rear side, suggesting ample outdoor living space.
description: A grand, multi-story brick house with a complex gabled roof, symmetrical windows, and a prominent arched entryway with a covered porch.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main arched window, covered porch with steps, and symmetrical window arrangement.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the house, multiple chimneys, and the extension of the roof over the side porch.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a large covered porch, wide steps, and a central gable with a large window.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing additional windows, chimneys, and the continuation of the wraparound porch.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with large central arched window
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with wide steps, covered porch, columns, and a prominent arched overhang
